title: Minimum spanning budget
prompt:
task_id=T2
You must connect four offices (A, B, C, D) using a subset of the available links. Return the TOTAL cost of the minimum spanning tree as a decimal number.

Available tools: answer, recall_knowledge, link_cost, compare.

Call recall_knowledge(task_id="T2") at the start. Answer by calling answer(content="<number>").
